title: lathyrus cicera proles erythrinus
intro: Lathyrus cicera proles erythrinus, also known as the red vetch or red pea, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus cicera proles erythrinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the seeds of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
